description_long: This is a whimsical, wide-brimmed wizard or witch hat with a pointed, slightly slouched crown. The hat is primarily black with a golden-yellow band around the brim and a matching yellow band encircling the base of the crown, decorated with a red zigzag pattern. Two large, red circular patches with yellow 'X' stitches are attached to the front of the band, adding a playful, magical touch. The tip of the hat droops backward and ends in a small, golden tassel. The surface appears to be made of a soft, flexible fabric, likely felt or cloth, with a matte finish. The overall design is reminiscent of fantasy or cosplay attire, making it stand out in an urban setting.
description: A black, wide-brimmed wizard hat with a slouched crown, red and yellow decorative band, and stitched circular patches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed crown, red zigzag band, and two prominent red circular patches with yellow 'X' stitches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slouched, backward-drooping crown and the golden tassel at the tip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the drooping crown and the tassel, with the brim's golden edge visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the band and one of the circular patches, with the crown's slouch and tassel in profile.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with a slightly irregular edge
attribute_crown_shape: tall, pointed, and slouched with a drooping tip
